instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4016
故障现象：Axis %1 already used by NCU %2
output:
【可能原因】
1. Axis %1 already used by NCU %2
2. An attempt was made to apply setpoints to one axis from several NCUs. Only occurs with the NCU link system
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4016 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Define a correct, unique axis assignment.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4035
故障现象：Interpolation cycle from NCU%1 = %2 does not match NCU%3 = %4
output:
【可能原因】
1. Interpolation cycle from NCU%1 = %2 does not match NCU%3 = %4
2. Occurs only with an NCU link system. The interpolation cycles of the NCUs specified in the alarm do not match one another. The slowest IPO cycle in interconnected NCU systems must be an integral multiple of all configured IPO cycles.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4035 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Set a suitable value in MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO for all interconnected NCUs.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS1508
故障现象：DUPLICATE
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：DUPLICATE
2. M-CODE (INDEX TABLE REVERSING) M A function to which the same code as this M code is set exists. (index table indexing)

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS1508 或 CNC1508
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：8031
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 axis %3: Axis has no IPO functionality
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 axis %3: Axis has no IPO functionality
2. An axis/spindle that has been defined as a special axis/auxiliary spindle (see $MA_BASE_FUNCTION_MASK bit8), should be operated as an interpolating axis.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 8031 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Define axis as interpolating axis (see $MA_BASE_FUNCTION_MASK bit8) or change part program
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：2100
故障现象：NCK battery warning threshold reached
output:
【可能原因】
1. NCK battery warning threshold reached
2. The undervoltage monitor of the NCK battery has reached the prewarning threshold. This is at 2.7-2.9 V (nominal voltage of the battery is 3.0-3.1 V at 950 mAh).
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2100 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The battery must be replaced within the next 6 weeks. After this period, the voltage can drop below the alarm limit of 2.4-2.6 V if the RAMs to be buffered take up a lot of current.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10778
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 preprocessing stop with active tool radius
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 preprocessing stop with active tool radius
2. If a preprocessing stop is detected with active tool radius compensation (either programmed by the user or generated internally) and the setting data $SC_STOP_CUTCOM_STOPRE is set, then this warning is issued because in this situation machine movemen
3. 系统反应：Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10778 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Continue machining with CANCEL and Start. - Modify part program. - Set setting data $SC_STOP_CUTCOM_STOPRE to FALSE.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：精密加工中心
故障现象：加工尺寸超差，同批次零件一致性差
output:
【可能原因】
1. 刀具磨损未补偿
2. 热变形导致坐标漂移
3. 反向间隙或螺距误差
4. 装夹变形或基准不一致

【排查步骤】
1. 测量刀具磨损并检查补偿表
2. 监控温升与坐标漂移量
3. 做球杆仪/激光干涉检测
4. 对比首件与末件尺寸变化
5. 检查程序刀补与坐标系

【处理建议】
1. 及时更新刀具磨损补偿
2. 开启热补偿或预热机床
3. 执行螺距补偿与间隙校准
4. 优化装夹减少变形
5. 加强首件检验与过程抽检

output:

2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

output:

1. - Activate FAST-IPO-LINK function in MN_MM_NCU_LINK_MASK - Or do not set different position control or IPO cycles on the NCUs (see MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO and MN_POSCTRL_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6510
故障现象：Too many part programs in the NC memory
output:
【可能原因】
1. Too many part programs in the NC memory
2. The number of files in the file system (part of the NC memory) of the NC has reached the maximum number possible. Note: During initial start-up, this can concern files from the NC file system, e.g. drive data, MMC files, FIFO files, NC programs, ...
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6510 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. - Delete or unload files (e.g. part programs), or - Increase $MM_NUM_FILES_IN_FILESYSTEM.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10757
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 changing the compensation plane while tool
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 changing the compensation plane while tool
2. In order to change the compensation plane (G17, G18 or G19) it is first necessary to deselect the cutter radius compensation with G40.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10757 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Insert an intermediate block in the part program using the correction deselection. After the plane change, the cutter radius compensation is to be selected in an approach block with linear interpolation.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 根据以下传感器监测数据，判断可能的故障类型并给出诊断建议。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：Torque [Nm] 超限，Rotational speed [rpm] 下降
output:
【可能原因】
1. 切深或进给过大
2. 刀具钝化导致切削力增大
3. 工件或刀具装夹刚性不足

【排查步骤】
1. 检查当前切削参数
2. 评估刀具磨损与装夹状态
3. 对比历史正常加工电流/扭矩
4. 检查是否存在机械干涉

【处理建议】
1. 降低切深与进给速度
2. 更换锋利刀具
3. 改善装夹方案提高刚性
4. 优化刀路减少瞬时负载

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:

报警代码：4630
故障现象：Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
output:
【可能原因】
1. Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
2. For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The reference in $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE to a corresponding entry in machine data array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[] which is required for configuring PROFIBUS handwheels is not available.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Configure the machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE for the corresponding PROFIBUS handwheel so that there is a valid reference to an entry in the machine data array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[].
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证

output:

2. MD 32410 JOG_AND_POS_JERK_ENABLE (jerk limitation) and MD 35240 ACCEL_TYPE_DRIVE (acceleration reduction) have been defined as the initial setting for an axis. However, the two functions cannot be activated at the same time for one axis.

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：各传感器读数无明显规律，Machine failure 偶发
output:
【可能原因】
1. 电气接触不良或信号干扰
2. 传感器偶发失效
3. 软件/PLC 逻辑边界条件触发

【排查步骤】
1. 调取故障前后报警与操作日志
2. 检查电缆屏蔽与接地
3. 对各传感器做交叉验证
4. 排查近期程序或参数变更

【处理建议】
1. 紧固接头并改善屏蔽
2. 更换可疑传感器
3. 回滚异常参数变更
4. 建立故障复现记录便于根因分析

output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：ILLEGAL

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS312 或 CNC312

4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：8040
故障现象：Machine data %1 reset, corresponding option is not set
output:
【可能原因】
1. Machine data %1 reset, corresponding option is not set
2. A machine data has been set that is locked by an option.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 8040 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. For retrofitting the option, please refer to your machine manufacturer or to a sales representative of SIEMENS AG, A&D MC.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

output:

1. Option 'activation of more than %1 channels' not set
2. A 2nd channel has been indicated but the corresponding option does not exist.
3. 系统反应：NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 8020 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. In the system-specific MD 10010 ASSIGN_CHAN_TO_MODE_GROUP, reduce the number of channels to 1 or retrofit the option for a 2nd channel.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6418
故障现象：Channel %1 tool %2 with tool edge no. %3 has reached tool monitoring
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 tool %2 with tool edge no. %3 has reached tool monitoring
2. This message informs that at least one cutting edge of the time or quantity monitored tool has reached its monitoring limit. The limit was detected in the channel context. The alarm originated during NCprogram execution.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6418 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. For information only. The user must decide what to do.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS352
故障现象：SYNCHRONOUS
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：SYNCHRONOUS
2. CONTROL AXIS COMPOSITION ERROR. T This error occurred when: 1) An attempt was made to perform synchronous control for the axis during a synchronization, composite, or superimposed control. 2) An attempt was made to synchronize a further great-grandch

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS352 或 CNC352
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10636
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
2. The tool radius compensation of the working area limitation of the stated axis is not taken into account. Reason: A transformation is active. The alarm is reported in JOG mode.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10636 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The tool radius compensation for working area limitations in JOG mode cannot be taken into account if transfomation is active.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

Set the machine data for dividing up the VDI user interface of the compile cycles (DB 9) into input and output bytes in accordance with the functions in the compile cycles. The maximum quantity of 400 bytes must not be exceeded. There are n
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复

output:

2. The spindle functionality requires a modulo axis (positions in [deg],.).

【排查步骤】

2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态

【处理建议】

2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复

4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4346
故障现象：Channel %1 invalid geoaxis assignment in machine data %2[%3]
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 invalid geoaxis assignment in machine data %2[%3]
2. Machine data TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X contains an invalid entry. The following causes for the error are possible: - The entry references a channel axis which does not exist. - The entry is zero (no axis) but the transformation needs the relevant axis
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4346 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Correct the entry in TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X or TRAFO_AXES_IN_X.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

2. This error only occurs with direct advancing of the container. With direct container advancing, only one channel is allowed to activate the NC language command for advancing the container. In order to ensure this, the other channels must have the res
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：Tool wear [min] 持续上升，扭矩 [Nm] 波动加大
output:
【可能原因】
1. 刀具达到寿命极限未及时更换
2. 切削参数与材料不匹配加速磨损
3. 冷却不足导致刀具过热磨损

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀具磨损计数与当前刀刃状态
2. 对比正常工况下的扭矩与振动趋势
3. 审查切削速度与每齿进给是否过大
4. 确认冷却液喷射是否对准刀尖

【处理建议】
1. 更换磨损刀具并重新对刀
2. 优化切削参数降低刀具负载
3. 恢复冷却液流量与浓度
4. 设置刀具寿命预警阈值

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4210
故障现象：Channel %1 spindle %2 declaration as rotary axis missing
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 spindle %2 declaration as rotary axis missing
2. If a machine axis is to be operated as a spindle, this machine axis must be declared as a rotary axis.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4210 详情

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Set rotary axis declaration for this machine axis in the axis-specific MD 30300 IS_ROT_AX.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

For this purpose, the geometry axis index for the displayed geometry axis must be determined by means of the channel-specific MD array 20060 AXCONF_GEOAX_NAME_TAB. The channel axis number
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复

故障现象：Default values for drive cycle times differ
output:
【可能原因】
1. Default values for drive cycle times differ
2. For SIMODRIVE 611D and SINUMERIK 810D only: External control modules of the SIMODRIVE 611D bus and the controls within the CCU3 module have different default values for the cycle times of the current and speed control loops.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4102 详情

3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. External control modules of the SIMODRIVE611D bus and the controls within the CCU3 module have different default values for the current and speed control cycle times. Check the specified values and modify accordingly (see MD_CURRCTRL_CYCLE_TIME and MD_SPEEDCTRL_CYCLE_TIME).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：2001
故障现象：PLC has not started up
output:
【可能原因】
1. PLC has not started up
2. The PLC must give at least 1 sign of life within a period of time defined in MD 10120 PLC_RUNNINGUP_TIMEOUT (Default setting: 1 sec.).
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Local alarm reaction. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2001 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The monitoring time in in MD 10120 PLC_RUNNINGUP_TIMEOUT must be checked and adapted to the first OB1 cycle. - Establish the cause of error in the PLC (loop or stop in the user program) and eliminate.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6500
故障现象：NC memory full
output:
【可能原因】
1. NC memory full
2. The NCK file system is full. The available buffered memory does not suffice. Note: At initial start-up, files of the NC file system may be affected such as drive data, MMC files, FIFO files, NC programs...
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6500 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Adjust the size of the buffered memory ($MN_MM_USER_MEM_BUFFERED) or increase the space available in the buffered memory, e.g. by unloading part programs that are no longer being used. Or decrease the size of the ring buffer (see $MC_RESU_RING_BUFFER_SIZE).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。

output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 WAB distance invalid or not programmed
2. Possible causes: - In a WAB block, the parameter DISR has not been specified or its value is less than or equal to 0. - During approach or retraction with circle and active tool radius, the radius of the internally generated - WAB contour is negative
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10742 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Modify part program.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。

故障现象：Axis container %1, location %2 already used by NCU %3
output:
【可能原因】
1. Axis container %1, location %2 already used by NCU %3
2. A multiple reference to the axis container location has been made via the logical axis table (machine data: MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB). With the NCU link, the multiple reference may also have been made by another NCU in the NCU group. Example: Conta
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4017 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Correct and complete the container location assignments. Check the machine data for the logical axis assignment table (MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB)
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:

报警代码：6406
故障现象：Channel %1 PLC acknowledge for command %2 is missing
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 PLC acknowledge for command %2 is missing
2. There is still no acknowledgement from the PLC for the tool change. The NCK cannot continue processing until it receives this acknowledgement for the specified command number. Possible command number values are described for alarm 6405.
3. 系统反应：NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NCK alarms 01/2008 Overview of Alarms 2-65 © Siemens AG, 2008. All Rights 

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6406 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. - Erroneous PLC communication: Correct the PLC program. - It is possible to release NCK with the PLC command 7 from the wait condition. This aborts the waiting command.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

故障现象：Local link axis %1 is not allowed for different interpolation cycle time =
output:
【可能原因】
1. Local link axis %1 is not allowed for different interpolation cycle time =
2. Local link axes are only permissible on an NCU if the interpolation cycle set corresponds to the slowest interpolation cycle of the interconnected NCU systems.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Remove local link axis (see MN_AXCONF_MACHAX_NAME_TAB and MN_AXCT_AXCONF_ASSIGN_TAB1) or adapt the interpolation cycle (MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS92 或 CNC92
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10635
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
2. The tool radius compensation of the working area limitation of the stated axis is not taken into account. Reason: The tool must be of type milling cutter or drill. The alarm is reported in JOG mode.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10635 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The tool radius compensation for working area limitations in JOG mode can only be taken into account for milling or drilling tools.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：通用五轴/三轴加工中心
故障现象：切削过程振动加剧，工件表面出现振纹
output:
【可能原因】
1. 刀具磨损或悬伸过长
2. 工件装夹刚性不足
3. 切削参数与机床固有频率共振
4. 丝杠/导轨松动或轴承间隙过大

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀具磨损量与悬伸长度
2. 检查工装夹具压紧力与支撑点
3. 降低切深/转速做对比试切
4. 检查各轴联轴器与导轨螺栓
5. 查看振动传感器或电流波动趋势

【处理建议】
1. 更换刀具或缩短悬伸
2. 增加支撑、优化装夹方案
3. 调整转速避开共振区
4. 紧固机械传动部件
5. 必要时进行动平衡或几何精度检测

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10610
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2 not stopped
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2 not stopped
2. An axis/spindle has been positioned over several NC blocks using the POSA/SPOSA instruction. The programmed target position had not yet been reached ("exact stop fine" window) when the axis/spindle was reprogrammed. Example: N100 POSA[U]=100 : N125 
3. 系统反应：NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10610 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Check and correct the part program (analyze whether motion beyond block boundaries is appropriate here). Prevent block change by means of the keyword WAITP for axes or WAITS for spindles until the positioning axes or positioning spindles have also reached their target position. Example for axes: N10
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：8010
故障现象：Option 'activation of more than %1 axes' not set
output:
【可能原因】
1. Option 'activation of more than %1 axes' not set
2. More machine axes have been defined through the channel-specific MD 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED than are allowed in the system.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 8010 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The sum of all axes that have been configured through the channel-specific MD 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED, must not exceed the maximum number of axes (dependent on configuration -> option, basic version: 4 axes).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS158
故障现象：TOOL
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：TOOL
2. LIFE VALUE OUT OF RANGE The life value that is being set is too large. Change the setting.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS158 或 CNC158
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6010
故障现象：Channel %1 data block %2 not or not completely created, error code %3
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 data block %2 not or not completely created, error code %3
2. The data management has detected an error in power-up. The specified data block may not have been created. The error number specifies the type of error. If the error number >100000, then there is a fatal system error. Otherwise, the user memory area 
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm. NCK alarms 01/2008 Over

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6010 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Correct the machine data or undo the changes made. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. There are two determining machine data for cycle programs: - $MN_MM_NUM_MAX_FUNC_NAMES = max. number of all cycle programs, error number = 2 shows that this value is too small. - $MN_MM_NUM_
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：8030
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 option 'interpolation of more than %3 axes' not set
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 option 'interpolation of more than %3 axes' not set
2. The option for the number of interpolating axes does not correspond to the number of axes programmed in the interpolation group.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 8030 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Option: "Interpolation of more than 4 axes" (the number of permitted axes can be set in this option) or program in the part program as many axes corresponding to the configuration of the control.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10704
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 protection zone monitoring is not guaranteed
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 protection zone monitoring is not guaranteed
2. New movements of a geometry axis which have been added could not be allowed for at the time of block preparation. It is therefore not certain that the protection zones will not be violated. This is just a warning message without further reactions.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10704 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Take other measures to ensure that the geomotry axes motion, including the additional motion, does not violate the protection zones. (The warning comes nevertheless) or exclude additional motions.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6020
故障现象：Machine data have been changed - now memory is reorganized
output:
【可能原因】
1. Machine data have been changed - now memory is reorganized
2. Machine data have been changed that define the NC user memory allocation. Data management has restructured the memory in accordance with the altered machine data.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6020 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. No remedial measures are required. Any user data that are required must be input again.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10760
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 helical axis is not parallel to tool orientation
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 helical axis is not parallel to tool orientation
2. With active tool radius compensation a helix is only permissible if the helix axis is parallel to the tool, i.e. the circle plane and the compensation plane must be identical.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10760 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Orient helix axis perpendicular to the machining plane.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 invalid channel axis assignment in machine data %2[%3]
2. Machine data TRAFO_AXIS_IN_X contains an invalid entry. The following causes for the error are possible: - The entry refers to a channel axis which does not exist. - The entry is zero (no axis) but the transformation needs the relevant axis as a chan
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4347 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Correct the entry in TRAFO_AXES_IN_X.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：2100
故障现象：NCK battery warning threshold reached
output:
【可能原因】
1. NCK battery warning threshold reached
2. The undervoltage monitor of the NCK battery has reached the prewarning threshold. This is at 2.7-2.9 V (nominal voltage of the battery is 3.0-3.1 V at 950 mAh).
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2100 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The battery must be replaced within the next 6 weeks. After this period, the voltage can drop below the alarm limit of 2.4-2.6 V if the RAMs to be buffered take up a lot of current.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6418
故障现象：Channel %1 tool %2 with tool edge no. %3 has reached tool monitoring
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 tool %2 with tool edge no. %3 has reached tool monitoring
2. This message informs that at least one cutting edge of the time or quantity monitored tool has reached its monitoring limit. The limit was detected in the channel context. The alarm originated during NCprogram execution.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6418 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. For information only. The user must decide what to do.

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4346
故障现象：Channel %1 invalid geoaxis assignment in machine data %2[%3]
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 invalid geoaxis assignment in machine data %2[%3]
2. Machine data TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X contains an invalid entry. The following causes for the error are possible: - The entry references a channel axis which does not exist. - The entry is zero (no axis) but the transformation needs the relevant axis
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4346 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Correct the entry in TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X or TRAFO_AXES_IN_X.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

3. 报警清除后重新回零验证

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4035
故障现象：Interpolation cycle from NCU%1 = %2 does not match NCU%3 = %4
output:
【可能原因】
1. Interpolation cycle from NCU%1 = %2 does not match NCU%3 = %4
2. Occurs only with an NCU link system. The interpolation cycles of the NCUs specified in the alarm do not match one another. The slowest IPO cycle in interconnected NCU systems must be an integral multiple of all configured IPO cycles.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4035 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Set a suitable value in MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO for all interconnected NCUs.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。

报警代码：10607
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 thread with frame not executable
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 thread with frame not executable
2. The current frame is corrupting the reference between the thread length and the thread lead.
3. 系统反应：Local alarm reaction. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10607 详情

3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Perform thread cutting with G33, G34, G35 without a frame. - Use G63 or G331/G332. NCK alarms 01/2008
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：主轴转速波动，扭矩输出不稳定，可能伴随驱动器报警
传感器特征：Rotational speed [rpm] 波动，Torque [Nm] 异常
output:
【可能原因】
1. 电源电压不稳或缺相
2. 主轴/伺服驱动器故障
3. 电机绕组或接线异常

【排查步骤】
1. 测量进线三相电压与平衡度
2. 检查驱动器报警代码
3. 检查电机接线与接地
4. 查看近期是否有过载工况

【处理建议】
1. 排除电网问题后重启驱动器
2. 修复或更换故障驱动模块
3. 检查并紧固电气连接
4. 复核过载保护参数设置

input:

报警代码：4023
故障现象：Axis container %1 switch not allowed, axis container %2 switch active
output:
【可能原因】
1. Axis container %1 switch not allowed, axis container %2 switch active
2. Only one axis container can be rotated at a time.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4023 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Program must be canceled with Reset and the program sequences (NCUs, channels) must be synchronized such that only one axis container switch is active at a time.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：通用工业 CNC
故障现象：电气柜报警，机床突然断电或跳闸
output:
【可能原因】
1. 电源模块或稳压器故障
2. 短路或过载保护动作
3. 急停回路或安全继电器异常
4. 外部电网波动

【排查步骤】
1. 检查断路器/熔断器状态
2. 测量进线电压与三相平衡
3. 检查急停与安全门回路
4. 分段断电排查短路点
5. 查看电源模块报警记录

【处理建议】
1. 排除短路后更换熔断器
2. 修复或更换电源模块
3. 复位急停与安全回路
4. 加装稳压/滤波设备
5. 记录电网质量，必要时独立供电

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10760
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 helical axis is not parallel to tool orientation
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 helical axis is not parallel to tool orientation
2. With active tool radius compensation a helix is only permissible if the helix axis is parallel to the tool, i.e. the circle plane and the compensation plane must be identical.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10760 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Orient helix axis perpendicular to the machining plane.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：Rotational speed [rpm] 波动，Torque [Nm] 异常
output:
【可能原因】
1. 电源电压不稳或缺相
2. 主轴/伺服驱动器故障
3. 电机绕组或接线异常

【排查步骤】
1. 测量进线三相电压与平衡度
2. 检查驱动器报警代码
3. 检查电机接线与接地
4. 查看近期是否有过载工况

【处理建议】
1. 排除电网问题后重启驱动器
2. 修复或更换故障驱动模块
3. 检查并紧固电气连接
4. 复核过载保护参数设置

报警代码：PS1509
故障现象：DUPLICATE
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：DUPLICATE
2. M-CODE (SPOS AXIS ORIENTATION) T A function to which the same code as this M code is set exists. (spindle positioning, orientation)

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS1509 或 CNC1509
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10706
故障现象：Channel %1 NCK protection zone %2 reached with axis %3 during
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 NCK protection zone %2 reached with axis %3 during
2. The workpiece-related NCK protection zone has been reached with the specified axis. Note that another tool-related protection zone is still active. The workpiece-related protection zone can be traversed when the PLC has issued an enable signal.
3. 系统反应：Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10706 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Protection zone can be traversed after enable signal from PLC.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：7020
故障现象：Compile cycle alarm number has not been defined
output:
【可能原因】
1. Compile cycle alarm number has not been defined
2. The alarm ID used by the compile cycle manufacturer is not known to the system. This was not allocated when the compile cycle alarms were generated.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 7020 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The alarm can have 2 possible causes: - The alarm number has not been defined. A definition must still be made. - The call parameter used is not the same as the one transferred by the NCK.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

output:

2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

WALCS9, or d) Correct the working area limitation in $P_WORKAREA_CS_LIMIT_PLUS or $P_WORKAREA_CS_LIMIT_MINUS, or e) Deacti

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：5000
故障现象：Communication job not executable %1
output:
【可能原因】
1. Communication job not executable %1
2. The communication job (data exchange between NCK and MMC, e.g.: loading an NC part program) cannot be executed because there is insufficient memory space. Cause: Too many communication jobs in parallel.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 5000 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Reduce the number of communication jobs taking place at the same time or increase MD10134 $MN_MM_NUM_MMC_UNITS - Restart communication job. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. No remedial measures are possible - the operation triggering the alarm message has to be repeated. 
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

Then the tool should be able to be moved. - Check whether the tool data are correctly defined. Has the correct T number been specified? - Check whet

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4020
故障现象：Identifier %1 used several times in machine data %2
output:
【可能原因】
1. Identifier %1 used several times in machine data %2
2. When determining a name in the NCK tables (arrays) for: machine axes, Euler angles, Richtungsvektoren, direction vectors, interpolation parameters and intermediate point coordinates, an identifier has been used that is already in the control.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4020 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Select for the identifier to be entered a character string that is not yet used in the system (max. 32 characters).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10756
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 deselection of the tool radius compensation via
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 deselection of the tool radius compensation via
2. On deselection of the cutter radius compensation, the programmed end point is within the compensation circle. If this point were in fact to be approached without compensation, there would be a contour violation. If the cutter radius compensation is 
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10756 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Place deselection of the CRC such that the programmed end point comes to rest outside the compensation circle around the last active compensation point. The following possibilities are available: - Deselection in the next block - Insert intermediate block - Select retract behavior NORM
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：通用加工中心
故障现象：主轴过热报警，机床自动停机
output:
【可能原因】
1. 冷却液不足或冷却泵故障
2. 主轴轴承润滑不良或磨损
3. 长时间高负荷切削导致温升过快
4. 主轴电机散热风扇停转

【排查步骤】
1. 检查冷却液液位与泵运行状态
2. 查看主轴温度传感器读数与历史趋势
3. 检查主轴润滑脂/油气润滑系统
4. 确认主轴风扇与散热风道是否堵塞
5. 回顾近期切削参数是否偏大

【处理建议】
1. 补充或更换冷却液，修复冷却泵
2. 降低转速与进给，间歇切削降温
3. 按计划补充润滑或更换轴承
4. 清理散热风道，修复风扇
5. 恢复运行前做空运转温升测试

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10634
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
2. The tool radius compensation of the working area limitation of the stated axis is not taken into account. Reason: The tool is not oriented parallel to the axis (e.g. because toolcarrier or transformation is active). The alarm is reported in JOG mode.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10634 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The tool radius compensation for working area limitations in JOG mode can only be taken into account if the tool is parallel to the axis. Active transformation and toolcarrier must be switched off for this function.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

3. 系统反应：NC not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4022
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: ext. work
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: ext. work
2. The axis container switch enable cannot be given because an external zero offset is active.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4022 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The program must be aborted with the RESET key and the external zero point offset deselected before the container is advanced.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：通用 CNC
故障现象：程序执行中断，提示超程或软限位报警
output:
【可能原因】
1. 程序零点与工件坐标系不匹配
2. 软限位参数设置过小
3. 回零未完成即启动加工
4. 对刀数据错误或刀具补偿异常

【排查步骤】
1. 确认回零状态与参考点建立
2. 核对 G54-G59 工件坐标
3. 检查软限位与行程参数
4. 仿真运行程序检查极值坐标
5. 验证刀具长度/半径补偿值

【处理建议】
1. 重新回零并建立工件坐标系
2. 修正程序或对刀数据
3. 合理放宽软限位（在安全范围内）
4. 使用图形仿真预检刀路
5. 修正后先空跑再切削

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：刀具磨损时间累计偏高，加工表面粗糙度恶化，切削力波动增大
传感器特征：Tool wear [min] 持续上升，扭矩 [Nm] 波动加大
output:
【可能原因】
1. 刀具达到寿命极限未及时更换
2. 切削参数与材料不匹配加速磨损
3. 冷却不足导致刀具过热磨损

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀具磨损计数与当前刀刃状态
2. 对比正常工况下的扭矩与振动趋势
3. 审查切削速度与每齿进给是否过大
4. 确认冷却液喷射是否对准刀尖

【处理建议】
1. 更换磨损刀具并重新对刀
2. 优化切削参数降低刀具负载
3. 恢复冷却液流量与浓度
4. 设置刀具寿命预警阈值

2. The thread lead increase is causing an axis overload. A spindle override of 100% is assumed during verification.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10604 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Reduce the spindle speed, thread lead increase or path length in the NC program.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6401
故障现象：Channel %1 tool change not possible: Empty location for tool %2 on
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 tool change not possible: Empty location for tool %2 on
2. The tool cannot be moved into the selected tool magazine. There is no appropriate location for this tool. A suitable location is mainly determined by the status. The status must indicate that this location is free, not disabled, not reserved and not 
3. 系统反应：NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6401 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Check whether the magazine data have been defined correctly. - Check whether there is still room in the magazine to add another tool; there may not be due to operating procedures. - Check whether a location type hierarchy is defined and whether it, for example, does not allow insertion of a type
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10765
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 3D tool radius compensation not possible
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 3D tool radius compensation not possible
2. This alarm occurs when an attempt is made to activate the 3D tool radius compensation even though the option required for this is not fitted in the control.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10765 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Use another software version. The option cannot be activated by altering machine data because the necessary code is not physically available.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

input:

故障现象：刀具磨损时间累计偏高，加工表面粗糙度恶化，切削力波动增大
传感器特征：Tool wear [min] 持续上升，扭矩 [Nm] 波动加大
output:
【可能原因】
1. 刀具达到寿命极限未及时更换
2. 切削参数与材料不匹配加速磨损
3. 冷却不足导致刀具过热磨损

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀具磨损计数与当前刀刃状态
2. 对比正常工况下的扭矩与振动趋势
3. 审查切削速度与每齿进给是否过大
4. 确认冷却液喷射是否对准刀尖

【处理建议】
1. 更换磨损刀具并重新对刀
2. 优化切削参数降低刀具负载
3. 恢复冷却液流量与浓度
4. 设置刀具寿命预警阈值

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:

报警代码：PS73
故障现象：PROGRAM
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：PROGRAM
2. NUMBER ALREADY IN USE The commanded program number has already been used. Change the program number or delete unnecessary programs and execute program registration again.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS73 或 CNC73
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式

4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10203
故障现象：Channel %1 NC start without reference point (action=%2)
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 NC start without reference point (action=%2)
2. NC start has been activated in the MDI or AUTOMATIC mode and at least one axis that needs to be referenced has not reached its reference point.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10203 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Via the channel-specific MD 20700: REFP_NC_START_LOCK (NC Start without reference point) you can decide whether or not the axis has to be referenced before NC Start. The start of referencing can be enabled channel-specific or axisspecific. 
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：工艺温度与空气温度温差异常，机床温升过快
传感器特征：Process temperature [K] 偏高，Air/Process 温差缩小
output:
【可能原因】
1. 冷却系统效率下降或堵塞
2. 环境通风不良
3. 长时间连续高负荷运行

【排查步骤】
1. 检查冷却泵、风扇与换热器运行
2. 清理冷却液管路和过滤网
3. 监测主轴与进给轴温升曲线
4. 检查车间环境温度与通风

【处理建议】
1. 修复冷却系统并补充冷却液
2. 清理散热通道
3. 合理安排间歇加工降低热负荷
4. 必要时检修换热器

output:

2. Selected cam pair not activated by MD $MN_SW_ASSIGN_TAB or several cam pairs selected.
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】

3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Activate the cam pair or select only one cam pair.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：攻丝加工中心
故障现象：刚性攻丝时断丝锥或螺纹质量差
output:
【可能原因】
1. 主轴与 Z 轴同步误差大
2. 丝锥磨损或材质不匹配
3. 底孔直径不合适
4. 攻丝转速/进给比设置错误

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刚性攻丝相关参数
2. 测量底孔直径与丝锥规格
3. 观察攻丝过程扭矩曲线
4. 验证主轴编码器与 Z 轴跟随
5. 单孔试切评估螺纹规检测

【处理建议】
1. 校准刚性攻丝增益与同步
2. 选用合适丝锥并控制寿命
3. 修正底孔直径
4. 按推荐 F/S 比设置参数
5. 必要时改用啄攻或浮动攻丝

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：7020
故障现象：Compile cycle alarm number has not been defined
output:
【可能原因】
1. Compile cycle alarm number has not been defined
2. The alarm ID used by the compile cycle manufacturer is not known to the system. This was not allocated when the compile cycle alarms were generated.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 7020 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The alarm can have 2 possible causes: - The alarm number has not been defined. A definition must still be made. - The call parameter used is not the same as the one transferred by the NCK.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10650
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2 incorrect gantry machine data, error code %3
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2 incorrect gantry machine data, error code %3
2. An incorrect value was entered in the gantry-specific axial machine data. Further information can be derived from the error number. - Error no. = 1 => either an incorrect gantry unit has been entered or the designation of the following axis is incorr
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10650 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Correct the machine data: MD 37100 GANTRY_AXIS_TYPE 0: No gantry axis 1: Master axis grouping 1 11: Slave axis grouping 1 2: Master axis grouping 2 12: Slave axis grouping 2 3: Master axis grouping 3 13: Slave axis grouping 3
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10261
故障现象：Channel %1 communication overload for block preparation
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 communication overload for block preparation
2. The internal communication between the NCK modules that evaluate the channel-specific VDI signals (START/STOP/RESET/DDTG/ASUBS/...) and the block preparation are overloaded. The block preparation modules are not being allocated enough computing time
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10261 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. More processor time must be allocated to the block preparation modules. Machine data $MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO or $MN_SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME can be increased for this purpose.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 tool radius compensation: too many blocks with
2. The maximum permissible number of blocks with active compensation suppression with tool radius compensation is limited by the machine data CUTCOM_MAXNUM_SUPPR_BLOCKS.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end. NCK alarms 01/2008 Ove

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10777 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Modify part program. - Modify machine data. - Check whether SBL2 is activated. With SBL2, a block is generated from each part program line which can lead to exceeding the maximum permissible number of empty blocks between two traversing blocks.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10261
故障现象：Channel %1 communication overload for block preparation
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 communication overload for block preparation
2. The internal communication between the NCK modules that evaluate the channel-specific VDI signals (START/STOP/RESET/DDTG/ASUBS/...) and the block preparation are overloaded. The block preparation modules are not being allocated enough computing time
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10261 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. More processor time must be allocated to the block preparation modules. Machine data $MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO or $MN_SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME can be increased for this purpose.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6415
故障现象：TO unit %1 tool %2 with tool edge no. %3 has reached tool monitor
output:
【可能原因】
1. TO unit %1 tool %2 with tool edge no. %3 has reached tool monitor
2. This message informs that at least one cutting edge of the time or quantity monitored tool has reached its monitoring limit. The alarm was triggered through the OPI interface (MMC, PLC). The channel context is not defined. The TO unit was specified 
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6415 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. For information only. The user must decide what to do.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10630
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 axis %3 at working area limit %4
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 axis %3 at working area limit %4
2. The specified axis violates the working area limitation. This is recognized only in the main run either because the minimum axis values could not be measured before the transformation or because there is a motion overlay.
3. 系统反应：Local alarm reaction. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10630 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Program other motion or do not perform overlaid motion.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS52
故障现象：CODE
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：CODE
2. IS NOT G01 AFTER CHF/CNR T The block next to the chamfering or corner R block is not G01 (or vertical line). Modify the program.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS52 或 CNC52
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4640
故障现象：Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
output:
【可能原因】
1. Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
2. For ETHERNET only: The handwheel module for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE is not available for ETHERNET handwheels. $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 must always be set when configuring ETHERNET handwheels.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4640 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Set machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 for the corresponding handwheel.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：20070
故障现象：AXCONF_MACHAX_USED [kx]=m may be declared as geometry axes or transformation axes
output:
【可能原因】
1. AXCONF_MACHAX_USED [kx]=m may be declared as geometry axes or transformation axes
2. AXCONF_MACHAX_USED [kx]=m may be declared as geometry axes or transformation axes
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 20070 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check and correct either - $MC_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB - $MC_TRAFO_AXES_IN_X - $MC_TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X - $MC_FGROUP_DEFAULT_AXES - and/or $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：湿式切削加工中心
故障现象：冷却液泄漏，切削区域供液不足
output:
【可能原因】
1. 冷却管路老化破裂
2. 水泵密封损坏
3. 过滤系统堵塞回流不畅
4. 液位开关误报

【排查步骤】
1. 检查管路接头与软管
2. 观察水泵运行声音与压力
3. 清理过滤网与排屑器
4. 校验液位传感器
5. 检查切削液浓度与变质情况

【处理建议】
1. 更换损坏管路或密封件
2. 修复/更换冷却泵
3. 定期清理过滤与排屑系统
4. 按标准浓度补充切削液
5. 泄漏区域做好防护与清理

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：无明显单一传感器趋势，间歇性异常停机
传感器特征：各传感器读数无明显规律，Machine failure 偶发
output:
【可能原因】
1. 电气接触不良或信号干扰
2. 传感器偶发失效
3. 软件/PLC 逻辑边界条件触发

【排查步骤】
1. 调取故障前后报警与操作日志
2. 检查电缆屏蔽与接地
3. 对各传感器做交叉验证
4. 排查近期程序或参数变更

【处理建议】
1. 紧固接头并改善屏蔽
2. 更换可疑传感器
3. 回滚异常参数变更
4. 建立故障复现记录便于根因分析

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6454
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 tool change not possible. No distance relation
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 tool change not possible. No distance relation
2. The desired tool change is not possible. Neither the spindle nor the buffer magazine location have a distance relation.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6454 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Check whether the magazine data ($TC_MDP2) have been defined correctly. - Check whether the alarm-causing program command _ e.g. TCI _ has been programmed correctly.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：1004
故障现象：Alarm reaction to NCK alarm incorrectly configured
output:
【可能原因】
1. Alarm reaction to NCK alarm incorrectly configured
2. The alarm reaction configured by the operating system or the compile cycles manufacturer is incorrect.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 1004 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Make a note of the error text and contact Siemens AG A&D MC, Hotline (tel./fax: see alarm 1000) Change alarm reaction
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：1000
故障现象：System error %1
output:
【可能原因】
1. System error %1
2. With this alarm, internal alarm states are displayed that, in conjunction with the transferred error number, provide information on the cause and location of the error.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 1000 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Make a note of the error text and contact Siemens A&D MC, Hotline - Tel 0180 / 5050 - 222 (Germany) - Fax 0180 / 5050 - 223 - Tel +49-180 / 5050 - 222 (International) - Fax +49-180 / 5050 - 223 - email techsupport@ad.siemens.de
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS1534
故障现象：ADDRESS
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：ADDRESS
2. F OVERFLOW (G95) The feedrate for the hole drilling axis calculated from the F and S codes is too fast in the feed per single rotation mode.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS1534 或 CNC1534
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10656
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2 gantry slave axis dynamically overloaded
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2 gantry slave axis dynamically overloaded
2. The indicated gantry slave axis is dynamically overloaded, i.e. the slave axis cannot follow the master axis dynamically
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Local alarm reaction. Channel not ready. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10656 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Compare the axial machine data of the gantry slave axis with the data of the gantry master axis
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10632
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 axis %3 reaches the coordinate system-specific
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 axis %3 reaches the coordinate system-specific
2. The specified axis violates the coordinate system-specific working area limitation. This is not detected until the main run, either because the minimum axis values could not be determined before the transformation or because there is an overlaid mov
3. 系统反应：Local alarm reaction. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10632 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Program other motion or do not perform overlaid motion.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

【排查步骤】

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Modify part program.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4182
故障现象：Channel %1 invalid M auxiliary function number in %2%3, MD reset
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 invalid M auxiliary function number in %2%3, MD reset
2. In the specified machine data, a number has been specified for the configuration of an M function which is occupied by the system, and cannot be used for an assignment. (M0 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45 and also M98, M99 with applied ISO dialect). The 
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4182 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Configure an M function in the specified machine data which is not occupied by the system (M0 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45 and also M98, M99 with applied ISO dialect).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

故障现象：NC system memory full
output:

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6583 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Delete or unload files (e.g. parts programs)
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10654
故障现象：Channel %1 waiting for synchronization start of gantry group %2
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 waiting for synchronization start of gantry group %2
2. The alarm message appears when the axes are ready for synchronization. The gantry grouping can now be synchronized. The actual value difference between the master and slave axes is greater than the gantry warning limit MD 37110 $MA_GANTRY_POS_TOL_WAR
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10654 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. See Function Manual, Special Functions, Gantry Axes (G1)
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10604
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 thread lead increase too high
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 thread lead increase too high
2. The thread lead increase is causing an axis overload. A spindle override of 100% is assumed during verification.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10604 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Reduce the spindle speed, thread lead increase or path length in the NC program.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10732
故障现象：Channel %1 block %5 axis %2 working area limitation violated, residual
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %5 axis %2 working area limitation violated, residual
2. This alarm is generated if it is determined during block preparation that the programmed path of the stated axis violates the working area limitation. This alarm is issued instead of alarm 10730 if bit 11=1 in machine data $MN_ENABLE_ALARM_MASK. Alar
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10732 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. a) Check NC program for correct positional data and, if necessary, make corrections. b) Check zero offsets (current frame) c) Correct working area limitation via G25/G26, or d) Correct working area limitation via setting data, or e) Deactivate working area limitation via setting data 43410 WORKAREA_
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6422
故障现象：Channel %1 tool move not possible. Magazine no. %2 not available.
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 tool move not possible. Magazine no. %2 not available.
2. The desired tool motion command - triggered from the MMC or PLC - is not possible. The magazine with the specified number is not available.
3. 系统反应：NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6422 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Check whether the magazine data have been defined correctly. - If the PLC issued the command for motion: check whether the PLC program is correct. - If the MMC issued the command for motion: check whether the MMC command was assigned correct parameters.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4102
故障现象：Default values for drive cycle times differ
output:
【可能原因】
1. Default values for drive cycle times differ
2. For SIMODRIVE 611D and SINUMERIK 810D only: External control modules of the SIMODRIVE 611D bus and the controls within the CCU3 module have different default values for the cycle times of the current and speed control loops.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4102 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. External control modules of the SIMODRIVE611D bus and the controls within the CCU3 module have different default values for the current and speed control cycle times. Check the specified values and modify accordingly (see MD_CURRCTRL_CYCLE_TIME and MD_SPEEDCTRL_CYCLE_TIME).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10762
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 too many empty blocks between two traversing
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 too many empty blocks between two traversing
2. The maximum permissible number of empty blocks is limited by a machine data.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10762 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Modify part program - Modify machine data - Check whether SBL2 is activated. With SBL2, a block is generated from each part program line which can lead to exceeding the maximum permissible number of empty blocks between two traversing blocks.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4000
故障现象：Channel %1 machine data %2[%3] has gap in axis assignment
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 machine data %2[%3] has gap in axis assignment
2. The assignment of a machine axis to a channel by the machine data 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED must be contiguous. At system power-up (Power On) gaps are detected and displayed as an alarm.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4000 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The entries for the indices for the machine axes used in the channels must be contiguous in table $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED. Channel axis gaps must be enabled via $MN_ENABLE_CHAN_AX_GAP.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10759
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 path is parallel to tool orientation
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 path is parallel to tool orientation
2. In a block with spline or polynomial interpolation, the corrected path runs in at least one point parallel to the tool orientation, i.e. the path has a tangent perpendicular to the compensation plane. The tangent at a point on a path is regarded as p
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10759 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Do not use splines or polynomials when writing the contour section, but straight lines and circles instead. Divide up the tool piece geometry and deselect the cutter radius compensation between the various sections.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。

报警代码：4010
故障现象：Invalid identifier used in machine data %1[%2]
output:
【可能原因】
1. Invalid identifier used in machine data %1[%2]
2. When determining a name in the NCK tables (arrays) for: machine axes, Euler angles, direction vectors, normal vectors, interpolation parameters and intermediate point coordinates, one of the following syntax rules for the identifier to be entered ha
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Enter the identifier for user-defined names with correct syntax in the displayed MD. - Machine axes: AXCONF_MACHAX_NAME_TAB - Euler angles: EULER_ANGLE_NAME_TAB - Normal vectors: NORMAL_VECTOR_NAME_TAB - Direction vectors: 10640 DIR_VECTOR_N

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4631
故障现象：Invalid handwheel slot for handwheel %1
output:
【可能原因】
1. Invalid handwheel slot for handwheel %1
2. For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The handwheel slot for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT is not available for PROFIBUS handwheels.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4631 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Configure machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT to a valid handwheel slot for the corresponding PROFIBUS handwheel.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS79
故障现象：PROGRAM
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：PROGRAM
2. NOT MATCH The program in memory does not match the program stored on tape. Multiple programs cannot be matched continuously when bit 6 (NPE) of parameter No. 3201 is set to “1”. Set bit 6 (NPE) of parameter No. 3201 to “0” before executing a match.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS79 或 CNC79
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10633
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2 is at coordinate system-specific working area limit
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2 is at coordinate system-specific working area limit
2. The specified axis reaches the coordinate system-specific working area limitation in JOG mode.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10633 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Check the system parameter $P_WORKAREA_CS_xx for the coordinate system-specific working area limitation.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。

故障现象：NCK battery alarm
output:
【可能原因】
1. NCK battery alarm
2. The undervoltage monitoring (2.4 - 2.6 V) of the NCK battery was detected during system power-up.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. The NC switches to follow-up mode. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Sto

【排查步骤】

3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Pull out the battery/fan unit from the NC module and replace the battery (type: lithium battery with lead, size 1/2 AA, 850 mAh, min. 3.2 V). The system must then be reinitialized because it must be assumed that data has been lost in the buf
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4025
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: master/slave
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: master/slave
2. It is not possible to enable axis container switch as a master/slave link is active.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4025 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Abort program with the RESET key. If required, disconnect the master - slave coupling.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

2. A multiple reference to the axis container location has been made via the logical axis table (machine data: MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB). With the NCU link, the multiple reference may also have been made by another NCU in the NCU group. Example: Conta
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【处理建议】
1. Correct and complete the container location assignments. Check the machine data for the logical axis assignment table (MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB)
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10757
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 changing the compensation plane while tool
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 changing the compensation plane while tool
2. In order to change the compensation plane (G17, G18 or G19) it is first necessary to deselect the cutter radius compensation with G40.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10757 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Insert an intermediate block in the part program using the correction deselection. After the plane change, the cutter radius compensation is to be selected in an approach block with linear interpolation.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS155
故障现象：ILLEGAL
output:
【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：ILLEGAL
2. T-CODE COMMAND In a machining program, the T code specified in the same block as M06 does not correspond to the group in current use. Modify the program.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS155 或 CNC155
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10747
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 retraction direction not defined for WAB
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 retraction direction not defined for WAB
2. In a WAB retraction block with quarter circle or semi-circle (G248 or G348), the end point in the machining plane was not programmed, and either G143 or G140 without tool radius compensation is active.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10747 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Modify part program. The following changes are possible: - Indicate end point in the machining plane in the WAB block. - Activate tool radius compensation (effective for G140 only, not for G143). - State retraction side explicitly with G141 or G142. - Perform retraction with a straight line instead 
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10223
故障现象：Channel %1: Command %2 is already occupied
output:
【可能原因】
1. Channel %1: Command %2 is already occupied
2. This channel has received a negative acknowledgment from the inter-channel communication because this command is already active or has not yet been terminated, e.g.: INIT(x,"ncprog") but a program select request is already active for channel x.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10223 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. This is an indication of possible discrepancies. The program continues if no acknowledgment is called for.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 请根据以下机床故障信息进行诊断分析，给出可能原因、排查步骤和处理建议。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6432
故障现象：Function not executable. No tool assigned to tool holder/spindle
output:
【可能原因】
1. Function not executable. No tool assigned to tool holder/spindle
2. When an attempt is made to perform an operation that requires a tool to be located on the spindle. This can be the quantity monitoring function, for example.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6432 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Select another function, another toolholder/spindle, position tool on toolholder/spindle.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 作为CNC故障诊断专家，请针对下列故障现象给出专业诊断意见。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：2110
故障现象：NCK temperature alarm
output:
【可能原因】
1. NCK temperature alarm
2. The temperature sensor has reached the response threshold of 60 degrees C +/- 2.5 degrees C.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2110 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. In order to reset the sensor, the temperature must be reduced by 7 degrees C.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

instruction: 以下为CNC机床报警/故障信息，请分析故障原因并提供详细的排查与处理方案。
input:
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6530
故障现象：Too many files in directory
output:
【可能原因】
1. Too many files in directory
2. The number of files in one directory of the NCK has reached the maximum limit.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6530 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. - Delete or unload files (e.g. part programs) in the respective directory, or - Increase $MM_NUM_FILES_PER_DIR.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产
